mapper.select: SELECT a.NTT_ID, a.NTT_SJ, a.NTT_CN, a.FRST_REGISTER_ID, IFNULL(b.USER_NM, a.NTCR_NM) AS FRST_REGISTER_NM, DATE_FORMAT(a.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, a.RDCNT, a.PARNTSCTT_NO, a.ANSWER_AT, a.ANSWER_LC, a.USE_AT, a.ATCH_FILE_ID, a.BBS_ID, a.NTCE_BGNDE, a.NTCE_ENDDE, a.SJ_BOLD_AT, a.NOTICE_AT, a.SECRET_AT, c.COMMENT_CO FROM COMTNBBS a LEFT JOIN COMVNUSERMASTER b ON a.FRST_REGISTER_ID = b.ESNTL_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT NTT_ID, BBS_ID, COUNT(1) AS COMMENT_CO FROM COMTNCOMMENT WHERE USE_AT = 'Y' GROUP BY NTT_ID, BBS_ID ) c ON a.NTT_ID = c.NTT_ID AND a.BBS_ID = c.BBS_ID WHERE a.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND a.USE_AT = 'Y' AND (a.ANSWER_AT IS NULL OR a.ANSWER_AT != 'Y') AND a.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWrd}, '%') AND a.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWrd}, '%') AND b.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWrd}, '%') ORDER BY a.SORT_ORDR DESC, a.NTT_NO ASC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(a.NTT_ID) FROM COMTNBBS a LEFT JOIN COMVNUSERMASTER b ON a.FRST_REGISTER_ID = b.ESNTL_ID WHERE a.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND a.USE_AT = 'Y' AND (a.ANSWER_AT IS NULL OR a.ANSWER_AT != 'Y') AND a.NTT_SJ LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWrd}, '%') AND a.NTT_CN LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWrd}, '%') AND b.USER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchWrd}, '%')

SELECT a.NTT_ID, a.NTT_SJ, a.NTT_CN, IFNULL(b.USER_NM, a.NTCR_NM) AS FRST_REGISTER_NM, DATE_FORMAT(a.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS FRST_REGIST_PNTTM FROM COMTNBBS a LEFT JOIN COMVNUSERMASTER b ON a.FRST_REGISTER_ID = b.ESNTL_ID WHERE a.BBS_ID = #{bbsId} AND a.PARNTSCTT_NO = #{nttId} AND a.ANSWER_AT = 'Y' AND a.USE_AT = 'Y' ORDER BY a.SORT_ORDR ASC, a.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM ASC
